name: Ramesh Kumar
feedback: Best passport photo maker ever! Replaced the background in one click and generated perfect 2x2 crop. Highly recommended for exam filings.

name: Priya Sharma
feedback: The signature resizer is super helpful. I compressed my signature photo to under 20KB for the corporate registry portal. Saved me hours of manual editing!

name: Arun Yadav
feedback: Dual-sided Aadhaar card merger saved me a lot of printer paper. Merged both front and back sides into one single sheet dynamically.

name: Elena Rostova
feedback: I used the PDF page editor. Highlighting and masking are done entirely offline in real-time, blending perfectly with white page canvas. Excellent privacy guarantee!
